goal: Drain the inbox strictly by weight on the fully defended pipeline (ADR-0074 routing gate + disposition S1/S2 + blocker breaker + revived S5 quarantine all live). Structural band first: ship-landed verification floor, disposition router S3+S4 (wire retrofile + recurrence escalation with live-path proofs), percycle-apicover-newexport-parity (temp-module reproduction, flip skip back to hard pin), pre-dispatch AC authoring guard. Then the token-efficiency stack. Every fix: TDD red-first, regression test, adversarial audit, wiring proof in the composed path. No inert API. Tests must NEVER mutate the live repo tree.
